description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that runs on every push. The workflow consists of three jobs: test, build, and release. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs Poetry, and runs tests with pytest. The build job depends on test, builds the project with Poetry, and uploads the artifact if the push is a tag. The release job depends on build, downloads the artifact, and releases it to GitHub and PyPI if the push is a tag.
